name: WLF_TALENT_PROF_GAP_SUMMARY
description: This table stores person talent profile content item gaps summary

columns.Name: TALENT_PROF_GAP_SUMMARY_ID
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier

columns.Name: OBJECT_PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: Specifies identifier of talent profile

columns.Name: PROFILE_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Specifies talent profile type

columns.Name: CONTENT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HRT_CONTENT_TYPES_B

columns.Name: CONTENT_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HRT_CONTENT_ITEMS_B

columns.Name: CONTENT_ITEM_TEXT
columns.Comments: Specifies content item text value of type free-form text

columns.Name: TALENT_PROFILE_SECTION_ID
columns.Comments: Specifies section id of talent profile content item

columns.Name: ROLE_PROFILE_SECTION_ID
columns.Comments: Specifies section id of role profile content item

columns.Name: ROLE_PROF_MIN_REQ_RATING1
columns.Comments: Specifies role profile item numeric rating1

columns.Name: ROLE_PROF_MIN_REQ_RATING2
columns.Comments: Specifies role profile item numeric rating2

columns.Name: ROLE_PROF_MIN_REQ_RATING3
columns.Comments: Specifies role profile item numeric rating3

columns.Name: ROLE_PROF_NORMALIZED_RATING1
columns.Comments: Specifies normalized value for role profile item numeric rating1

columns.Name: ROLE_PROF_NORMALIZED_RATING2
columns.Comments: Specifies normalized value for role profile item numeric rating2

columns.Name: ROLE_PROF_NORMALIZED_RATING3
columns.Comments: Specifies normalized value for role profile item numeric rating3

columns.Name: IMPORTANCE
columns.Comments: Relative importance of profile item

columns.Name: ESS_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier for the ESS Job evaluating the talent profile gaps

columns.Name: GAP_TYPE
columns.Comments: Specifies whether the gap corresponds to current role or career of interest.

columns.Name: INCL_UNC_RES_SKILLS
columns.Comments: Specifies whether to include uncurated resource skills while calculating gap filling objects

columns.Name: INCL_RES_WITH_OUTCOME_ONLY
columns.Comments: Specifies whether to consider only resources with outcome while calculating gap filling objects

columns.Name: ORIG_CONTENT_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HRT_CONTENT_ITEMS_B

columns.Name: ORIG_CONTENT_ITEM_TEXT
columns.Comments: Specifies content item text value of type free-form text

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
